title: groupBcode
text:
What can be done to improve this code?
#create an object storing a vector repeating the character term "Ipomoea" 4 times
genus<-rep(4, "Ipomoea")
#create another vector object with the following character objects:

tricolor
alba
indica
batatas

c(tricolor, alba, indica, batatas)
#create a vector object that concatenates the text from the first object with that of the second object (so that each term has a genus and a species
fullName<-genus + species

title: groupAcode
text:
What can be done to improve this code?
#create an object that stores a vector of 500 numbers from a standard normal distribution
x<-rnorm(0,1)
#create another object from the same data but squared
x^2
#make these into a scatter plot
scatterplot(x,y)

title: groupCcode
text:
What can be done to improve this code?
#create a vector of the numbers 1 through 25
a<-c(1,25)
#create another vector from the same data but multiplied by 7
a * 7
#add the 8th and 16th item in the vector
b(8) + b(16)
